concerns.text: T014 (Create data model classes) appears AFTER T008-T013 (ingestion tasks), but data models define structures that ingestion code consumes. Data model should precede implementation tasks that use it (producer-consumer violation).

T019 (Create metric output schema) appears AFTER T015-T018 (extraction tasks), but schema defines output structures that extraction code writes to. Schema should precede implementation (producer-consumer violation).
T008 and T009 both marked [P] but write to same file `code/data_ingestion.py`. Parallel-safe tag is misleading as they share output file, creating potential merge conflicts.
T015 and T016 both marked [P] but write to same file `code/metric_extraction.py`. Parallel-safe tag is misleading as they share output file.
T024 (boxplot visualization) and T028 (output writing) marked [P] but depend on T021-T023 (statistical results). Cannot run in parallel with analysis tasks.
